listings.title: ROLAND TR 626 RHYTHM COMPOSER
listings.body: Roland drum machine in excellent condition. Original owner, used only in studio. 9 Volt power supply included. See specs below : 48 preset, 48 user Patterns. Six Songs (maximum 999 Pattern steps). 30 drum voices. 8‑voice polyphony. Stereo output, plus eight individual outputs. Allowing for control and processing of each drum . Start/Stop footswitch jack socket. MIDI In/Out sockets. Tape Sync In/Out sockets. Tape dump In/Out socket. Power from 9V external adaptor or six AA batteries.

listings.title: Danby 7.2 cu. ft. Chest Freezer, Like New
listings.body: This Danby 7.2 cu. ft. chest freezer is in like-new condition and has been lightly used with minimal contents. Since we no longer need it, we are selling it. Paid, $325, Selling for $175 Model Mo. SKU: DCF072A3WDB-6 Specs 7.2 cu. ft. (204 L) capacity chest freezer Environmentally friendly R600a refrigerant Garage ready: freezer can perform in temperatures from 0°F to 110°F (-17°C to 43°C) Energy efficient foam insulated cabinet & lid Front mount mechanical thermostat is conveniently located for easy temperature control Front mounted drain allows for easy drainage during manual defrost 1 adjustable wire storage basket for smaller, frequently used items Rear rollers and front leveling legs allow for an easy installation Rounded lid design for a modern look Easy clean interior liner
